prompting.responds_best_to: Precise coding tasks with file context, signatures, and explicit constraints; a sample of the target code style.
prompting.avoid: Underspecified requirements — it fills gaps with plausible but possibly unwanted code.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Produce only code that matches the existing conventions. Include no explanation unless explicitly asked.

quirks: UNVERIFIED model string at dossier creation — confirm availability before routing
Strong at matching a provided code style — give it a sample
May omit edge-case handling unless explicitly prompted

handoff.output_format_instruction: Ask for a unified diff or a complete file; specify the language and that prose should be omitted.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Run or lint the code; check edge cases and that it did not invent APIs or signatures.
